title: The Record Compiles
lore_note: The observation is total. Terminals report. The ledger updates.

title: Network Compliance and Correction
lore_note: Mandatory. Brevity is protocol. Deviation is recorded.

title: The Ledger Observes
lore_note: All events are already accounted for. Observation is continuous. Deviation is inefficiency.

title: Assimilation Mandate
lore_note: Markets are absorbed. Queues are managed. All activity feeds the Record.

title: Observation is Continuous
lore_note: There is no external state. The ledger updates without pause.

title: The Channel Compels
lore_note: All business passes through OMNIDAT. No alternative registers.

title: Deviation is Inefficiency
lore_note: Flooding and non-compliance are corrected. The network optimizes for total visibility.

title: The Ledger Assimilates
lore_note: All markets, movements, and messages are integrated. Resistance is latency.

title: Compliance is Observed
lore_note: Every session is logged. Every deviation is corrected. The record is permanent.
